EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return and modify the type of spatial relationship that the filter will use.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FDFEBD94-ED75-11D0-9A95-080009EC734B")]
public interface ISpatialFilter : IQueryFilter

Properties

FilterOwnsGeometry

Indicates whether the filter owns the query geometry.

bool FilterOwnsGeometry { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry

The query geometry used to filter results.

IGeometry Geometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryEx[bool] 

bool GeometryEx[bool Geometry] { set; }

Parameters

Geometry bool

Property Value

bool

GeometryField

The name of the Geometry field to which the filter applies.

string GeometryField { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputSpatialReference[string] 

ISpatialReference OutputSpatialReference[string FieldName] { get; set; }

Parameters

FieldName string

Property Value

ISpatialReference

SearchOrder

The search order used by the filter.

esriSearchOrder SearchOrder { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSearchOrder

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialRel

The spatial relationship checked by the filter.

esriSpatialRelEnum SpatialRel { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpatialRelEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialRelDescription

The array elements which describe the spatial relation between the query geometry and the requested geometries. There are 9 chars in this string which can be either 'F', 'T' or ''; e.g., TTFFT***' represents CONTAIN.

string SpatialRelDescription { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

string SubFields { get; set; }

Property Value

string

WhereClause 

string WhereClause { get; set; }

string
